title: ononis arvensis var. leiosperma
intro: Ononis arvensis var. leiosperma, also known as the lesser burnet, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of lesser burnet are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Lesser burnet is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
